_source: gin7 manual pp.100-101 via logh7-manual-canon.md §13 (+§13.3 initial deployment pp75-78)
_pdf: .omo/work/gin7manual/gin7manual.pdf page idx99 = manual p100 (rotated vertical-text table reconstructed via PyMuPDF word x/y bands; idx = manualPage - 1)
_confidence_notes: PDF-VERIFIED p100 兵員ユニット (troop unit) stat table. The digest's (extraction-uncertain) flag on 近衛兵 pairing is now RESOLVED: orphan '20 20' cells (x=127.8) bind to 近衛兵 (x=121-122) => 近衛兵 = 訓練課程300 / 陸戦攻撃力20 / 陸戦防御力20.
Table columns (vertical text): 訓練課程 (training cost / 양성 비용), 陸戦攻撃力 (ground attack / 지상전 공격력), 陸戦防御力 (ground defense / 지상전 방어력). 艦隊乗組員 has '-' for both ground stats (non-combatant ship crew).

Table is split into 帝国軍 (Empire, label y~634) and 同盟軍 (Alliance, label y~344) halves; catalogs are near-identical, differing only in the elite unit: Empire=擲弾兵教導, Alliance=薔薇の騎士 (Rosen Ritter) — both 900/30/30.

Footnote VERIFIED verbatim on p100: '※近衛兵／擲弾兵教導／薔薇の騎士は現在生産されておりません' (近衛兵 / 擲弾兵教導 / 薔薇の騎士 are NOT currently produced — stat rows exist but are excluded from the buildable roster; pre-existing such units may still fight).

INITIAL DEPLOYMENT (pp75-78): NOT re-extracted here — already canonically extracted with uncertain=0 in content/initial-deployment.json (per canon §22, idx74=p75, rotation=0 horizontal text, adversarial-verified 5/5). This file only references/summarizes it to avoid duplication and conflict. Per-planet auto-production catalog (自動生産品目一覧表 pp76-78) lives in content/auto-production.json.
GALAXY MAP (p101 星系図): NOT included here — it is a vector positional graphic, already recovered into content/galaxy.json (+ galaxy-raster-star-centers.json). Noted for existence only per task spec.
Stat-column→unit binding now high confidence (PDF word-coordinate reconstruction); previously digest rated it 'medium'.

troopUnits._note: 兵員ユニット (troop/soldier units). 両陣営 = both factions share the catalog except the elite tier (擲弾兵教導 vs 薔薇の騎士).

units.notes: Not currently produced (生産されておりません). Stat pairing PDF-verified (300/20/20).
Empire elite tier; Alliance counterpart = 薔薇の騎士. Not currently produced.
Non-combatant ship-manning unit; '-' for ground stats.
Alliance elite tier; Empire counterpart = 擲弾兵教導. Not currently produced.
Non-combatant ship-manning unit; '-' for ground stats.

troopUnits.productionFootnote_ja: ※近衛兵／擲弾兵教導／薔薇の騎士は現在生産されておりません
troopUnits.productionFootnote_en: 近衛兵 (Imperial Guard) / 擲弾兵教導 (Grenadier Instructors) / 薔薇の騎士 (Rosen Ritter) are not currently produced. Their stat entries exist but they are excluded from the buildable roster; pre-existing units of these types may still fight.

proficiencyTiers._note: 修練度 (proficiency / 숙련도), 4 tiers. Newly produced units start at Green; improves via training or combat.

initialDeployment._note: Initial faction deployment tables (部隊初期配置一覧表) for pp75-78 are NOT duplicated here. They are already extracted byte-complete (uncertain=0) and adversarially verified (5/5).
_knownGapsAndMismatches: Imperial patrol 第48 is a manual source gap (47→49 direct, '第48' appears 0 times).
Imperial patrol 第53~60 have blank system/planet in the manual (note: blank in manual).

Cross-source mismatch フレイア/レンテンベルク: the p75 table prints Imperial 第6・7艦隊 and 第41~43巡察隊 HQ at フレイア / レンテンベルク, but galaxy.json's フレイア planet list (p101 annotation) lacks レンテンベルク. Recorded as-printed in initial-deployment.json; revisit on フレイア re-verify.
Fortresses (イゼルローン/ガイエスブルク/レンテンベルク/ガルミッシュ/ルドミラ) carry planet_type:'fortress' (content/fortresses.json).
initialDeployment._autoProductionCatalog: Per-planet auto-production item table (自動生産品目一覧表, pp76-78) is in content/auto-production.json. Reliability: values reliable, planet pairings require galaxy.json cross-check; crew column uniformly 艦隊乗組員, ground column ∈ {軽装陸戦兵, 装甲擲弾兵, 装甲兵}; garrison colonies auto-produce 軽装陸戦兵 only; fortress/capital (Iserlohn, Odin, Heinessen) are heaviest producers.

galaxyMap._note: p101 星系図 (galaxy map) is a vector positional graphic (star-system dots + Text-annotation labels), NOT tabular. Existence noted only — already recovered separately into content/galaxy.json and content/galaxy-raster-star-centers.json (PDF vector layer, Y-flip lesson). No extraction performed here per task spec.
